blockers.description: Persona.HERMES string constant exists in models.py, adaptive_scheduler.py, scheduler.py — used as a default persona label, not a runtime import. No functional dependency on external hermes package, but naming should be cleaned up in G1.
Old .nexara files (CURRENT_GATE.md, NEXT_ACTION.md, EXECUTION_CHECKPOINT.json) contain deprecated gate names and should be retired after confirming no external references.
